title: Lunalii Pack
description: An all rounded modpack featuring popular mods as well Lunalii mods
body:
An all rounded modpack featuring Lunalii mods as well as many optimisation mods and a variety of popular mods.  
Built for a unique and cozy experience in a familiar settings.

Included contents are:
- Food expansions
- Exploration
- Tech
- Quality of life
- Mobs
- Combat and tools
- World generation
- Difficulty

But most importantly, it is best intended as a cozy experience.  
Have fun!

Disclaimer: I decided to move the pack to quilt. I'm in the process of learning quilt and porting my mods there. In the meantime the modpack is available in V2.0.0 without them.
